name: Microsoft Entra ID - sign-in logs (UEBA / Zero Trust)
description: Inbound connector: ingests Microsoft Entra ID sign-in logs into XORCISM.IDENTITYSIGNIN - the continuous-verification telemetry behind the /zero-trust Identity pillar and the UEBA session-risk (zerotrust.ts sessionRisk: MFA-less sign-ins, failed bursts, impossible travel, Entra risk level). Normalizes user, time, IP, location, device, MFA, result and risk. Modes: `file` (an exported sign-in JSON - a Graph value[] array), `live` (Microsoft Graph /auditLogs/signIns with a token), or `demo` (a built-in sample). Read-only against Entra. Config: GRAPH_TOKEN (or pass `token`). Idempotent by Entra sign-in id.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported Entra sign-in log (a JSON array, or a Graph {"value":[...]} object). A demo sample is used if omitted and no token is set.

parameters.name: token
parameters.help: Microsoft Graph bearer token (overrides GRAPH_TOKEN) for live /auditLogs/signIns

parameters.name: top
parameters.help: Max sign-ins to pull in live mode
